title: ascdraw: Editor for ASCII/UTF-8 diagrams (in 144FPS)
summary: ascdraw 是一个用于绘制 ASCII/UTF-8 图表的高性能编辑器，支持 144FPS 的流畅渲染。它允许用户快速创建和编辑基于文本的图表，适用于技术文档、代码注释等场景。该项目基于 Web 技术实现，具有实时预览和交互式编辑功能。
summary_en: ascdraw is a high-performance editor for creating ASCII/UTF-8 diagrams with smooth rendering at 144FPS. It enables users to quickly create and edit text-based diagrams, suitable for technical documentation and code comments. The project is built on web technologies with real-time preview and interactive editing.
